home.title: Diff Shuttle
home.subtitle: Compare texts, code, JSON, CSV files side by side in your browser. 100% private, no uploads, no registration.
home.feature1Desc: All processing happens in your browser. No files are ever uploaded to any server.
home.feature2Desc: Compare text, code, JSON, and CSV files with intelligent diff algorithms.
home.feature3Desc: Clear visual diff with color coding — green for additions, red for deletions.
home.feature4Desc: Drag & drop files or paste text directly. Supports .txt, .json, .csv, .js, .py, and more.
home.feature5Desc: Use instantly without creating an account. Just paste and compare.
home.feature6Desc: No limits, no ads, no hidden fees. Completely free for everyone.
home.step1Desc: Paste your original text or upload a file on the left side
home.step2Desc: Paste or upload the modified version on the right side
home.step3Desc: Differences are highlighted instantly with color coding
home.privacyBadge: Your files never leave your device
home.whyDiffP1: Text comparison is essential for developers, writers, and anyone working with documents. Whether you're reviewing code changes, comparing configuration files, or tracking document revisions, a reliable diff tool saves time and prevents errors. Traditional desktop tools require installation, and many online tools upload your files to remote servers — raising privacy concerns for sensitive code and documents.
home.whyDiffP2: Diff Shuttle solves this by running entirely in your browser. Using advanced diff algorithms powered by the npm 'diff' library, it provides instant, accurate comparisons without any data leaving your device. Support for multiple formats — plain text, source code, JSON, and CSV — makes it a versatile tool for any comparison task.
home.howDifferentTitle: How Diff Shuttle Differs from Other Tools
home.howDifferentP1: Unlike DiffChecker, Text-Compare, and similar online tools, Diff Shuttle never uploads your files to any server. All comparison happens locally using JavaScript, ensuring complete privacy for your code, documents, and data. This is especially important for developers comparing proprietary code, businesses reviewing contracts, and anyone handling sensitive information.
home.howDifferentP2: Diff Shuttle also offers multiple comparison modes — line-by-line for code, word-by-word for documents, and structured comparison for JSON and CSV. Combined with syntax highlighting, unified and split views, and detailed statistics, it provides a professional-grade comparison experience without any cost or registration.

diff.dropzoneTitle: Drop file here or click to browse

about.heroSubtitle: A fast, private, browser-based text and code comparison tool by ShuttleLab
about.serviceP1: Diff Shuttle is a free online text and code comparison tool that processes everything directly in your browser. Unlike traditional diff tools that upload your files to remote servers, Diff Shuttle uses modern web technologies — JavaScript diff algorithms and the browser's rendering engine — to compare your texts without ever leaving your device.
about.serviceP2: Built by ShuttleLab, Diff Shuttle supports plain text, source code, JSON, and CSV comparison with intelligent algorithms that highlight additions, deletions, and modifications. Whether you need to review code changes, compare configuration files, or track document revisions, Diff Shuttle handles it all with zero privacy risk.
about.safeDesc: All comparison happens locally in your browser. No files are uploaded, no data is collected, and no third parties can access your content.
about.privacyDesc: Start comparing immediately — no sign-up, no email, no tracking. Just paste your text and go.
about.ttlDesc: Compare plain text, source code, JSON, and CSV files with format-aware diff algorithms for accurate results.
about.fastDesc: Instant comparison powered by optimized JavaScript algorithms. No server round-trips, no waiting.
about.use1: Developers reviewing code changes and pull requests
about.use2: Writers comparing document versions and drafts
about.use3: Data analysts validating JSON and CSV data
about.contactDesc: Have questions, feedback, or need support?
about.supportTitle: Meeting you for the first time feels like the return of an old friend
about.supportDesc: Diff Shuttle is crafted with care by ShuttleLab — completely free. If it has helped you compare even a single text, sharing it with friends who need it is the best support we could ask for.

privacyPage.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPage.intro: At Diff Shuttle, your privacy is our core value. This Privacy Policy explains our approach to data collection and processing when you use diff.shuttlelab.org.
privacyPage.section1Content: Diff Shuttle does not collect, store, or transmit any of your text or personal data. All comparison occurs entirely within your web browser using client-side JavaScript. Your files and text never leave your device.
privacyPage.section2Content: Diff Shuttle uses your browser's localStorage to store your preferences, such as theme selection (light/dark/system) and language settings (English/Chinese). This data remains on your device and is never transmitted to our servers.
privacyPage.section3Content: Unlike traditional online diff tools, Diff Shuttle performs all operations locally in your browser. There is no server-side processing, no file uploads, and no temporary storage on remote servers. This design ensures complete privacy for your content.
privacyPage.section4Content: Diff Shuttle is hosted on Cloudflare for content delivery. Cloudflare may collect standard web server logs (IP address, browser type, access time) as part of normal CDN operation. We do not use analytics trackers, advertising networks, or any other third-party services that collect user data.
privacyPage.section5Content: Diff Shuttle does not use cookies. All user preferences are stored in localStorage, which is not transmitted to our servers.
privacyPage.section6Content: Diff Shuttle does not knowingly collect any personal information from children under 13. Since we do not collect any personal data at all, our service is safe for users of all ages.
privacyPage.section7Content: We may update this Privacy Policy periodically. Any changes will be reflected in the 'Last updated' date above. Your continued use of Diff Shuttle after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacyPage.section8Content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at support@shuttlelab.org.

termsPage.title: Terms of Service
termsPage.intro: Welcome to Diff Shuttle. These Terms of Service govern your use of diff.shuttlelab.org. By accessing or using Diff Shuttle, you agree to be bound by these terms.
termsPage.section1Content: Diff Shuttle is a free, browser-based text and code comparison tool. All processing occurs locally in your browser — no files are uploaded to our servers. The service is provided as-is by ShuttleLab at no cost to the user.
termsPage.section2Content: By using Diff Shuttle, you represent that you are at least 13 years old and have the authority to enter into this agreement. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our service.
termsPage.section3Content: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use Diff Shuttle for personal and professional purposes. You may use the tool to compare texts and files you own or have permission to process.
termsPage.section4Content: You are responsible for the content you process through Diff Shuttle. You agree to only compare content you own or have legal permission to process. You must not use the service for any illegal purpose.
termsPage.section5Content: Diff Shuttle and its original content, features, and functionality are owned by ShuttleLab. The service uses the 'diff' npm library (MIT licensed) for comparison algorithms.
termsPage.section6Content: Diff Shuttle is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or produce specific comparison results.
termsPage.section7Content: ShuttleLab shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of Diff Shuttle, including but not limited to loss of data, loss of profits, or business interruption.
termsPage.section8Content: Diff Shuttle may contain links to other ShuttleLab products or third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content or practices of these external sites.
termsPage.section9Content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of Diff Shuttle after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.
termsPage.section10Content: For questions about these Terms, contact us at support@shuttlelab.org.
